body.title: Create /workflow skill — 30-second map of the full system
body.result: Created /workflow skill — full 30-second system map with WHERE AM I guide
body.description:
No single reference exists for 'what skills are there and when do I use them.' After a long absence or context compaction, Akien has no quick map. /workflow prints the full stack in one screen.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/skills/workflow/SKILL.md (new)
**Design rules:** output fits in one screen (~50 lines); written last so it reflects the actual final system
**Scope boundary:** in scope: the full stack diagram (Goals → Questions → Hypothesis → Design → Decision → Tickets → Outcomes); each skill listed with: name, one-line purpose, when to invoke; weekly tracks section (eval-run, weekly-retro, audit-expert); 'where am I?' guide for common situations (starting a session, ending a session, new idea, something broke). Out of scope: auto-detecting current state, interactive mode.
**Test plan:** skill file; verify it reads in under 60 seconds and answers 'what do I do when I have a new idea?' without ambiguity.
